items.title: Shell profits rise as Iran war pushes oil prices higher
items.dek: The energy giant reports profits of $6.92bn for the first three months of the year.
items.body: The energy giant reports profits of $6.92bn for the first three months of the year.

items.title: Ukraine is a global surrogacy hub - but that could be about to end
items.dek: Ukraine is considering a law that would effectively ban foreigners from accessing surrogacy in the country.
items.body: Ukraine is considering a law that would effectively ban foreigners from accessing surrogacy in the country.

items.title: Looksmaxxing influencer Clavicular charged over alleged alligator shooting
items.dek: The looksmaxxing influencer allegedly livestreamed himself firing gunshots from an airboat at an alligator.
items.body: The looksmaxxing influencer allegedly livestreamed himself firing gunshots from an airboat at an alligator.
